_schema.description: Curated driver facts. Keys are lowercase driver names. facts_provider matches case-insensitively and also tries a normalized form of the iRacing UserName. Users can add their own entries.

fields.known_for: str — short phrase describing the driver's reputation
fields.home_track: str — track they're most associated with (optional)

jardier.known_for: dominant open-wheel iRacing results and disciplined racecraft
jardier.fun_fact: Czech sim racer with a huge following built around open-wheel exploits and an analytical approach to setup.

maximilian benecke.known_for: multiple iRacing world championship wins and blistering qualifying pace
maximilian benecke.fun_fact: German sim racer widely regarded as one of the fastest one-lap drivers on the platform.

mitchell dejong.known_for: Porsche esports titles and a calm, consistent race pace
mitchell dejong.fun_fact: American sim racer who has carried his virtual pace into real-world GT programmes.

nils naujoks.known_for: GT3 coaching content and broadcast commentary
nils naujoks.fun_fact: Well-known sim coach whose breakdowns of GT3 technique are mandatory viewing for serious iRacers.

jamie fluke.known_for: endurance wins and careful tyre management
jamie fluke.fun_fact: British endurance specialist with a reputation for protecting tyres across triple-stint stretches.

kamil franczak.known_for: aggressive wheel-to-wheel craft in Porsche Cup
kamil franczak.fun_fact: Polish sim racer known for never giving up a position without a fight.
